settings.headline: Returns & Refunds
settings.subheadline: We want every order to be perfect. Here's what to do if something isn't right.
settings.policy_body: As our products are perishable, we follow a No Return, No Refund Policy. However, if your order arrives damaged or you receive the wrong items, just reach out to us — we'll make it right.
settings.exceptions_sub: You may request a refund or replacement under the following conditions.
settings.contact_hours: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM, excluding public holidays.
